/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/util/publish.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/util/subscribe.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/configParser/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/configParser/printer.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/configParser/free.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/toml/toml.c.o -o opcua_pubsub  /usr/local/lib/libopen62541.a -lpthread -lm -lrt /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmbedtls.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmbedx509.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmbedcrypto.so
